name: Hariharan Sandhrasekar
title: AI Developer | Data Engineer | Data Analyst | Full-Stack Developer | 4+ Years
subtitle: Dynamic Senior Developer adept at building intelligent agents and optimizing AI models
about: AI Developer focused on building intelligent, data-driven solutions using LLMs, data engineering, and modern web technologies, including AI-powered Excel automation, Power BI analytics, data analysis, and scalable full-stack web applications.

education.school: Bharathi Vidyalaya Matric Hr Sec - Thirupur

experience.description: Designed and developed full-stack web applications using React.js, Node.js, Express.js, and PostgreSQL. Built scalable RESTful APIs with proper documentation, authentication, and security best practices. Implemented role-based access control using OpenID and CSRF protection mechanisms. Optimized backend performance using caching strategies and efficient database query design. Developed reusable frontend components with modern state management techniques. Integrated third-party APIs, payment gateways, and external services. Built AI-powered features using LLMs for automation, intelligent responses, and workflow optimization. Designed and integrated RAG-based pipelines for contextual search and knowledge retrieval systems. Worked with prompt engineering techniques to enhance AI model accuracy and task-specific performance. Collaborated directly with clients to gather requirements and deliver production-ready systems.

Designed and developed intelligent AI agents capable of reasoning, planning, and autonomous decision-making. Integrated LLMs (GPT, Claude, Gemini) into multi-agent architectures for enhanced problem solving. Built RAG-based systems for enterprise search and knowledge retrieval. Worked with LangChain and custom orchestration frameworks for agent workflows and memory management. Improved system performance by optimizing microservices and reducing API latency. Integrated external APIs and tools to extend AI system capabilities. Applied prompt engineering and fine-tuning strategies for task-specific model optimization.

Developed reusable Angular components including custom selection and autocomplete modules. Implemented CDK overlays and improved UI/UX consistency across applications. Built JWT-based authentication and authorization systems. Developed Node.js + TypeScript APIs for backend integration and state management. Participated in application modernization and performance optimization efforts. Conducted stress testing and resolved performance bottlenecks.

Worked on Angular 7/8 frontend development and PostgreSQL backend systems. Handled module-level development, testing, and bug fixes. Improved HTML/SCSS components and gradually transitioned into TypeScript development. Collaborated with technical leads to deliver enterprise-level product modules.

achievements.title: Senior Developer at MSN Infotec
achievements.description: Led development of intelligent AI agents using Python, LLM, and Langchain. Integrated large language models into multi-agent systems for enhanced communication and problem-solving.

achievements.title: Next-Gen Application Upgradation
achievements.description: Played active role in upgrading client application to Angular 14 & 15. Conducted stress testing, improved performance, and integrated codebases.

achievements.title: API Orchestration System
achievements.description: Built robust APIs for backend interactions and third-party integrations using Node.js and TypeScript. Implemented non-blocking I/O and streams for high performance.

achievements.title: Custom Component Development
achievements.description: Developed custom components for Centiyent product including selection, autocompletion, and CDK-Overlays. Improved UI/UX in collaboration with design team.

certificates.name: Excel using AI workshop
certificates.description: Completed the Excel using AI Workshop by Office Master, focusing on AI-powered data analysis, advanced 3D visualizations, and automated PowerPoint presentation creation using Excel data.

content.description: Learn how to leverage AI-powered tools in Excel to analyze large datasets, identify patterns, and generate insights automatically. Master advanced functions and AI integrations for data processing and visualization.
Discover techniques to create stunning 3D charts and graphs in Excel. Transform complex data into interactive visual representations that bring your analysis to life with depth and clarity.
Streamline your presentation creation process by integrating Excel data directly into PowerPoint. Learn automation techniques to generate professional slides quickly and efficiently.

projects.title: Flappy Canvas
projects.description: SkyFlap is a browser-based Flappy Bird clone built with HTML5 Canvas and JavaScript, featuring responsive gameplay, collision detection, infinite scrolling obstacles, score tracking, and persistent high scores using LocalStorage.

projects.title: Personal Mail Sentinel & Monitor
projects.description: PMM is a high-fidelity, real-time dashboard designed for the modern SaaS professional. It seamlessly integrates secure Google Firebase authentication with a sophisticated glassmorphic interface to provide deep insights into your email communication, business analytics, and system architecture.

projects.title: Hiya Chat Assistant Frontend
projects.description: Hiya Chat Assistant Frontend is a React-based interface for interacting with an AI chat assistant. It connects to a backend API to send user messages and display AI responses in real time.

projects.title: Hiya Chat Assistant Backend
projects.description: Hiya Chat Assistant Backend is a Python-based system that powers an AI chat platform. It handles chat requests, integrates with Large Language Models (LLMs), and manages user interaction data.

projects.title: Daily Tech Harry
projects.description: Automated AI Telegram bot delivering curated software tech news from developer RSS feeds, highlighting programming, Java, AI, cloud, DevOps, and updates, with instant AI explanations.

projects.title: Excel Data Generator
projects.description: A cross-browser extension that generates scenario-based Excel data (Sales, Stock, Customer, Employee, etc.) and automatically pastes it into Google Sheets.
